description_long: This object is a compact, modern firearm with a sleek, matte black finish and a cylindrical suppressor attached to the barrel. The body is angular and streamlined, with a rectangular upper receiver and a slightly slanted grip that appears ergonomic for one-handed use. The trigger is housed within a rounded guard, and the magazine well is integrated into the grip, typical of many tactical weapons. The suppressor is prominent, extending the length of the barrel and giving the weapon a distinctive silhouette. There are minimal external markings or embellishments, emphasizing a utilitarian, tactical design. The overall construction suggests a focus on concealment and ease of handling in urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black firearm with a cylindrical suppressor and an angular, tactical design. Features a slanted grip, rounded trigger guard, and minimal external details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the firearm, including the suppressor, angular body, and slanted grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular opening of the suppressor and the narrow profile of the weapon.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the suppressor, grip, and trigger guard.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the grip and the alignment of the suppressor with the body.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, cylindrical suppressor attached, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible reinforcement or finger grooves
